description: Micro Center Bundles A Ryzen 7 9850X3D With A $499 Combo, Effectively Making The B850 Motherboard A Free Add-On  WccftechThe AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D is still the best gaming CPU for the money, and this deal makes it even more enticing  PC GuideSave a whopping $900 on this incredible 4-item AM5 combo from Newegg — for only $2,269, high-end parts including the flagship 9950X3D2 processor, 64GB of GSkill RAM, 4TB of fast M.2 storage, and a quality MSI motherboard  Tom's HardwareWalmart sells Ryzen 7 7800X3D for $269 in open box  GameGPUМикро Сентер Ryzen 7 9850X3D харидорларига бепул плата тақдим этмоқда  Zamin.uz
